nasb.text: I have taken off my dress, How can I put it on again? I have washed my feet, How can I dirty them again?

esv.text: I had put off my garment; how could I put it on? I had bathed my feet; how could I soil them?

cnv.text: 我回答：“我脫了外衣， 怎能再穿上呢？ 我洗了腳， 怎能再弄髒呢？”

ccb.text: 可是我已经脱了衣裳，难道要再穿上吗？ 我已经洗了脚，怎能再沾土呢？
